assertions.title: Reviewer workbench directly launches annotation tools

steps.action: Open local review route for seeded form FORM-M6-TEXT-001 as reviewer_001
steps.expected: Review workbench loads seeded task context
steps.observed: Route opened but workbench showed unbound context with formId=未绑定 and a WebGL2 failure banner.

steps.expected: Direct-launch controls appear in seeded review context
steps.observed: Direct-launch buttons for text/cloud/rectangle appeared in the panel.

steps.expected: Annotation mode activates in reviewer task context
steps.observed: UI switched to “等待 Viewer 初始化...” and never reached an active annotation session.

evidence.consoleErrors: none reported by agent-browser; visible UI error banner states WebGL2 initialization failed.
evidence.network: Seed data existed in localStorage reviewTasks, but live task binding did not populate formId in the workbench context.

assertions.issues: Blocked by browser environment: WebGL2 initialization failure prevents the launched annotation tool from becoming interactive, so the direct-launch affordance is visible but the runnable user flow cannot complete.

assertions.title: Reviewer workbench directly launches measurement

steps.observed: “创建测量” and direct-launch cards for distance/angle measurement were visible.

steps.action: Trigger create measurement and distance measurement
steps.observed: Measurement cards toggled in the panel, but no live measurement session started in the viewer.

evidence.consoleErrors: none reported by agent-browser; viewer banner still showed WebGL2 failure.
evidence.network: No separate measurement confirmation payload observed because the viewer session never initialized.

assertions.issues: Blocked by the same WebGL2 viewer initialization failure; the direct-launch UI is present, but the measurement session cannot be exercised through the user surface.

assertions.title: Legacy reviewer-visible OBB semantics are removed

steps.action: Open review panel in reviewer mode
steps.expected: Canonical reviewer labels appear with no OBB wording
steps.observed: Reviewer panel showed only 文字批注 / 云线批注 / 矩形批注 and no OBB wording in visible controls or summaries.

evidence.network: UI-only assertion; no network inspection needed.

assertions.title: Canonical annotations keep stable lineage across confirm/reload

steps.action: Load seeded review route and inspect workbench context
steps.expected: Seeded form/task lineage binds into the workbench for confirm/reload testing
steps.observed: Workbench rendered with “formId=未绑定” despite seeded tasks existing in localStorage and backend APIs.

evidence.consoleErrors: none reported; visible WebGL2 failure banner present.
evidence.network: Reviewer task API seeding succeeded, but the local embedded review route did not bind a concrete task/form context into the workbench.

assertions.issues: Blocked because the review workbench did not bind seeded lineage, and the WebGL2 failure prevented creating/confirming annotations for reload verification.

assertions.title: Measurement remains temporary before confirmation

steps.action: Attempt to start distance measurement from the review panel
steps.expected: Temporary measurement session appears before confirmation
steps.observed: Measurement launch controls appeared, but no active session or temporary candidate state became available.

evidence.consoleErrors: none reported; UI continued to report WebGL2 viewer failure.
evidence.network: No measurement session requests observed due to blocked viewer startup.

assertions.issues: Blocked by the viewer environment; cannot verify temporary pre-confirm measurement behavior without an active measurement session.

assertions.title: Confirmed measurement records replay in reviewer workbench

steps.action: Inspect reviewer workbench confirmed records area
steps.expected: Seeded confirmed measurement replay can be surfaced for the bound task
steps.observed: Confirmed records section existed but task context was unbound and no replayable seeded record surfaced in the browser flow.

evidence.consoleErrors: none reported; viewer banner indicated WebGL2 failure.
evidence.network: No reviewer replay payload observed because the seeded form was not bound into the workbench.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing bound task context plus WebGL2 failure, so replay of seeded measurement records could not be demonstrated through the UI.

assertions.title: Designer surfaces see the same confirmed measurement result set

steps.action: Prepare reviewer-side seeded loop for handoff to designer
steps.expected: Confirmed measurement result set available to compare across roles
steps.observed: Reviewer-side validation could not reach a confirmed or replayed measurement state.

evidence.network: Backend seeded tasks were discoverable, but no user-surface measurement record state was available to compare with designer views.

assertions.issues: Blocked downstream of reviewer-side measurement validation; without a reviewer replay state, designer parity could not be tested meaningfully.

assertions.title: Reviewer can create annotations and measurements from workbench and confirm both in one flow

steps.action: Open review workbench and inspect direct-launch affordances
steps.expected: Create annotation and measurement actions available together
steps.observed: All direct-launch affordances were visible in one workbench panel.

steps.action: Attempt to start annotation then measurement flow
steps.expected: Both tools can be run and included in confirmation
steps.observed: Neither tool could progress beyond viewer initialization blockers, and confirm remained unusable.

evidence.consoleErrors: none reported; visible WebGL2 failure banner persisted.
evidence.network: No confirmation chain requests observed because neither tool session became active.

assertions.issues: Blocked by environment and task-binding issues; the combined flow could not advance to confirmation.

assertions.title: Return/resubmit preserves canonical annotations and replayable measurements

steps.expected: Reviewer can reopen a loop task with preserved records
steps.observed: Seeded closed-loop task exists in backend/localStorage, but the reviewer user surface did not bind it into a replayable workbench flow.

evidence.network: Seeded loop task `seed-m6m7-return-resubmit` was present in discoverability APIs and localStorage, but not testable end-to-end in the browser flow.

assertions.issues: Blocked because prerequisite reviewer-side record creation/replay could not be completed in the browser environment.

frictions.description: The top-level “校审测试” button redirects to an external host (123.57.182.243) instead of staying on the local 127.0.0.1 environment required by mission guidance.
frictions.resolution: Returned to a locally constructed /review/3d-view route for the seeded form instead of using the external jump.

frictions.description: The embedded local review route retained seeded task inventory in localStorage but still rendered the workbench with formId=未绑定.
frictions.resolution: No safe local workaround found within validator scope.

blockers.description: The reviewer browser surface consistently shows “三维查看器初始化失败 需要 WebGL2（canvas.getContext("webgl2") 失败）”, preventing annotation and measurement sessions from becoming interactive.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried locally bound review route, switched to reviewer role, reopened the workbench, and reattempted direct-launch flows; blocker persisted.

summary: Tested 9 M6 browser assertions: 1 passed (canonical labels visible with no OBB wording) and 8 were blocked by the WebGL2 viewer initialization failure plus missing seeded form binding in the local review workbench.
